summary: Phase 4: Professional Reviews Management - Complete testing. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Dashboard Reviews tab and Public Profile reviews section working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Initial testing showed missing 'Avis' tab due to Metro bundler caching. Resolved after supervisor restart. Not a code bug, but a dev environment caching issue.

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/pros/{pro_id}/reviews correctly returns reviews with stats and rating distribution
GET /api/pro/dashboard/reviews correctly returns pending_responses count for badge display
POST /api/pro/dashboard/reviews/{id}/respond validates professional status and sends notification
PUT /api/pro/dashboard/reviews/{id}/respond allows editing and marks response as edited
Public profile [id].tsx correctly displays pro_response when present
Dashboard reviews tab correctly shows empty state when no reviews exist

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Reviews tab renders, empty state shows, API integration working)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Professional has 0 reviews as no completed bookings exist yet.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Reviews Management complete. Backend APIs tested: GET /api/pros/{pro_id}/reviews (public, with stats/distribution), GET /api/pro/dashboard/reviews (pro-only, with pending count), POST/PUT /api/pro/dashboard/reviews/{id}/respond (pro-only). Frontend: Dashboard has 'Avis' tab with pending badge, reviews stats card, empty state, and respond/edit modal. Public profile shows 'Avis récents' section with pro_response display. To fully test response flow, need completed bookings with reviews.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/pros/{pro_id}/reviews - Public endpoint returns reviews with stats and rating_distribution
GET /api/pro/dashboard/reviews - Pro-only returns reviews with pending_responses count
POST /api/pro/dashboard/reviews/{id}/respond - Pro responds to review (validates no existing response)
PUT /api/pro/dashboard/reviews/{id}/respond - Pro updates response (marks as edited)
frontend_components: Dashboard Reviews tab with pending count badge
Reviews stats card (average rating, total reviews)
Response modal for responding to reviews
Public profile 'Avis récents' section with pro_response display
api_contract_validations: Response includes success, data array, total count

test_results_summary.test_04_get_pro_reviews_sort_options: PASSED - recent and highest sorting works
test_results_summary.test_09_get_my_reviews_success: PASSED - Pro can access with pending_responses
